name: Wembli Table Lamp (Set of 2) - 22 Inch Height - TBL4411 - Robins Egg Blue - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Wembli table lamp set, featuring a serene robins egg blue color that adds a touch of tranquility to any room. These elegant lamps are crafted from fine ceramic, showcasing a sleek design that complements both classic and modern decor. Standing at 22.5 inches, they offer a perfect balance of form and function, providing ample light while serving as a stylish accent piece. Whether placed on a bedside table or in a living room, their soft hue and graceful silhouette create an inviting ambiance. Enhance your home with the Wembli lamp set and enjoy the beauty and lighting they bring to your favorite spaces.
